assertions.assertion: Replaces ICache<T> with HybridCache from Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid
assertions.rationale: Response explicitly shows replacing ICache<Client> with HybridCache and mentions Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.
Response shows `[FromKeyedServices("ConfigurationStoreCache")] HybridCache cache` and mentions ServiceProviderKeys.ConfigurationStoreCache.

assertions.assertion: Uses GetOrCreateAsync (not GetOrAddAsync) for the cache retrieval pattern
assertions.rationale: Response uses `_cache.GetOrCreateAsync(key, ...)` in the code example.
